title: Cross-chain Address Lookup
description: Resolve and look up the same wallet address across all supported EVM chains at once — discover active chains, last activity timestamps, and chain IDs in a single call.
useCase: Build a cross-chain identity card for any wallet — show which chains they use, when they were last active on each, and link to chain-specific explorers.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to look up across all chains
